sql_array: CREATE TABLE handlers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, language_id VARCHAR(10), handler_name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO handlers (id, language_id, handler_name) VALUES (1, 'en', 'English Handler');
INSERT INTO handlers (id, language_id, handler_name) VALUES (2, 'es', 'Spanish Handler');
UPDATE handlers SET handler_name = 'Updated English Handler' WHERE language_id = 'en';
